summary: Iteration 105: Tested Recruitment Approval Engine - backend APIs and frontend RecruitmentApprovalPanel. All 10 backend tests pass. Frontend correctly displays approval panel for applicants with blockers, progress bar, and navigation to requirements.

minor.issue: Two versions of endpoint exist (line 9665 and 27911). First version requires body with RecruitmentApprovalRequest model, second version doesn't check blockers before approval. The first version is being used.

critical_code_review_comments: Two versions of /api/employees/{id}/approve-recruitment endpoint exist - one at line 9665 (with RecruitmentApprovalRequest body) and one at line 27911 (with blocker checking). The first one is being used which doesn't enforce blocker checking before approval.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_recruitment_approval_engine.py - New test file for approval engine
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recruitment Approval Engine fully functional. Backend endpoints: GET /api/employees/{id}/recruitment-approval-check returns evaluation with can_approve, blockers, verified_count, required_count. POST /api/employees/{id}/approve-recruitment requires empty body {} and approves if no blockers. Frontend RecruitmentApprovalPanel shows for applicants only (person_stage='applicant' && !recruitment_approved), displays progress bar, blocker list with reasons, and View All Blockers button. Clicking blocker navigates to Compliance File tab.

backend_approval_check_endpoint.details: GET /api/employees/{id}/recruitment-approval-check returns evaluation with can_approve, blockers, verified_count, required_count, required_keys

backend_approve_endpoint.details: POST /api/employees/{id}/approve-recruitment with {} body - approves applicant, sets recruitment_approved=true, status=onboarding, assigns employee_code

backend_hca_10_requirements.details: Healthcare Assistant role correctly has 10 required items: right_to_work, identity, proof_of_address, dbs, reference_1, reference_2, interview_record, recruitment_checklist, staff_health_questionnaire, staff_personal_info

backend_nurse_11_requirements.details: Nurse role correctly has 11 required items (10 base + nmc_registration)

backend_blocker_reasons.details: Each blocker has meaningful reason: 'No evidence submitted', 'Reference not declared', 'Form not completed', etc.

frontend_panel_displays_for_applicants.details: RecruitmentApprovalPanel displays for applicants with person_stage='applicant' and recruitment_approved=false

frontend_progress_bar.details: Shows verified_count / required_count with percentage (e.g., '3 / 10 required items', '30% complete')

frontend_blocker_list.details: Shows blocking items with label and reason (e.g., 'Proof of Address - No evidence submitted')

frontend_view_blockers_button.details: View All Blockers button opens dialog with full blocker list

frontend_blocker_navigation.details: Clicking blocker navigates to Compliance File tab and shows toast 'Navigate to: {requirement}'

frontend_blockers_dialog.details: Blockers dialog shows 'Cannot Approve Recruitment' with list of blockers and Close button

console_errors_noted: 500 error on dashboard data fetch (unrelated to approval engine)
404 error on employment mismatch fetch (unrelated to approval engine)
